questionHtml:
The angle θ between a ramp and a horizontal surface slowly increases from zero. An object on the ramp does not slide as θ increases.

The frictional force on the object is


A.  constant.

B.  negligible.

C.  proportional to cos θ.

D.  proportional to sin θ.

meta.title: The angle θ between a ramp and a horizontal surface slowly increases from zero. An object on the ramp does not slide as θ increases. The frictional force on the object is A. consta
